tools.name: browse_templates
tools.description: Primary entrypoint when the user asks what products/items/templates can be customized. Use this before any broad Leewow capability summary. Python sends real product cards to Feishu directly and returns only send results plus finalAssistantReply=NO_REPLY.

category.description: Optional category filter (e.g. 'bag', 'accessory', 'home', 'apparel'). Leave empty to browse all.

count.description: Number of products/messages to return (1-10, default 5)

channel.description: Delivery channel. Use 'feishu' for current production flow.

feishu_target.description: Optional Feishu receive_id override. Leave empty to use FEISHU_RECEIVE_ID from skill env.

feishu_receive_id_type.description: Optional Feishu receive_id_type override, e.g. chat_id/open_id. Leave empty to use FEISHU_RECEIVE_ID_TYPE or default chat_id.

feishu_app_id.description: Optional Feishu App ID override. Leave empty to use FEISHU_APP_ID from skill env.

feishu_app_secret.description: Optional Feishu App Secret override. Leave empty to use FEISHU_APP_SECRET from skill env.

feishu_open_base.description: Optional Feishu Open API base override. Leave empty to use default https://open.feishu.cn.

tools.name: generate_preview
tools.description: Upload a design image and start generation. Returns task state only. Then call get_generation_status(task_id, poll=true) to get the preview image path plus the final reply markdown. Do NOT fabricate or guess any URL — only use purchaseUrl/replyMarkdown from get_generation_status.

image_path.description: Local file path of the design image. MUST be in workspace directory: ~/.openclaw/workspace/

design_theme.description: Design theme or style description (e.g. 'cute cartoon', 'minimalist')

tools.name: get_generation_status
tools.description: Check generation task status and, when possible, send the preview result to Feishu directly from Python. On success, returns only send results plus finalAssistantReply=NO_REPLY. This tool requires the same Feishu direct-send configuration as browse_templates, and the agent should pass feishu_target from the current conversation when available.

poll.description: Wait and poll until generation completes

feishu_target.description: Optional Feishu receive_id override. Leave empty to use FEISHU_RECEIVE_ID from skill env.

feishu_receive_id_type.description: Optional Feishu receive_id_type override, e.g. chat_id/open_id. Leave empty to use FEISHU_RECEIVE_ID_TYPE or default chat_id.

feishu_app_id.description: Optional Feishu App ID override. Leave empty to use FEISHU_APP_ID from skill env.

feishu_app_secret.description: Optional Feishu App Secret override. Leave empty to use FEISHU_APP_SECRET from skill env.

feishu_open_base.description: Optional Feishu Open API base override. Leave empty to use default https://open.feishu.cn.

tools.name: cos_presign_url
tools.description: Generate a presigned URL for accessing COS (Tencent Cloud Object Storage) images. Useful for private buckets or when images need temporary access tokens.

cos_url.description: COS URL to generate presigned URL for (e.g., https://bucket.cos.region.myqcloud.com/key.png)

expired.description: URL expiration time in seconds (default: 3600 = 1 hour)
